title: Stryker Pack
description: Vanilla+ style modpack running on fabric minecraft 1.20.1! Includes thirst, a few decoration mods, new animals and mob variants, and included shaders and better animations to spice up the game!
body:
Vanilla+ style modpack running on fabric minecraft 1.20.1! Includes thirst, a temperature system courtesy of EnvironmentZ, a few decoration mods, new animals and mob variants, and included shaders and better animations to spice up the game!








Sources
Vanilla Tweaks - https://vanillatweaks.net/

MiniHud - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud
Litematica - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica/files
Malilib - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib
